header.title: End Times - Last Days
header.description: These are verses about the last days, end times and the day of the Lord

texts.NIV84: Jesus left the temple and was walking away when his disciples came up to him to call his attention to its buildings.
texts.KJV: And Jesus went out, and departed from the temple: and his disciples came to him for to shew him the buildings of the temple.
texts.NASB95: Jesus came out from the temple and was going away when His disciples came up to point out the temple buildings to Him.
texts.NKJV: Then Jesus went out and departed from the temple, and His disciples came up to show Him the buildings of the temple.
texts.DRB: AND Jesus being come out of the temple, went away. And his disciples came to shew him the buildings of the temple.
texts.ESV: Jesus left the temple and was going away, when his disciples came to point out to him the buildings of the temple.
texts.LEB: And as Jesus went out of the temple courts he was going along, and his disciples came up to point out to him the buildings of the temple.
texts.AMP: Jesus left the temple area and was going on His way when His disciples came up to Him to call His attention to the [magnificent and massive] buildings of the temple.
texts.NLT: As Jesus was leaving the Temple grounds, his disciples pointed out to him the various Temple buildings.
texts.AKJV: And Jesus went out, and departed from the temple: and his disciples came to him for to shew him the buildings of the temple.
texts.NRSV: As Jesus came out of the temple and was going away, his disciples came to point out to him the buildings of the temple.

texts.NIV84: "Do you see all these things?" he asked. "I tell you the truth, not one stone here will be left on another; every one will be thrown down."
texts.KJV: And Jesus said unto them, See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NASB95: And He said to them, “Do you not see all these things? Truly I say to you, not one stone here will be left upon another, which will not be torn down.”
texts.NKJV: And Jesus said to them, “Do you not see all these things? Assuredly, I say to you, not one stone shall be left here upon another, that shall not be thrown down.”
texts.DRB: And he answering, said to them: Do you see all these things? Amen I say to you there shall not be left here a stone upon a stone that shall not be destroyed.
texts.ESV: But he answered them, “You see all these, do you not? Truly, I say to you, there will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down.”
texts.LEB: But he answered and said to them, “Do you not see all these things? Truly I say to you, not one stone will be left here on another stone that will not be thrown down!”
texts.AMP: And He said to them, “Do you see all these things? I assure you and most solemnly say to you, not one stone here will be left on another, which will not be torn down.”
texts.NLT: But he responded, “Do you see all these buildings? I tell you the truth, they will be completely demolished. Not one stone will be left on top of another!”
texts.AKJV: And Jesus said unto them, See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NRSV: Then he asked them, “You see all these, do you not? Truly I tell you, not one stone will be left here upon another; all will be thrown down.”

texts.NIV84: As he was leaving the temple, one of his disciples said to him, "Look, Teacher! What massive stones! What magnificent buildings!"
texts.KJV: And as he went out of the temple, one of his disciples saith unto him, Master, see what manner of stones and what buildings are here!
texts.NASB95: As He was going out of the temple, one of His disciples said to Him, “Teacher, behold what wonderful stones and what wonderful buildings!”
texts.NKJV: Then as He went out of the temple, one of His disciples said to Him, “Teacher, see what manner of stones and what buildings are here!”
texts.DRB: AND as he was going out of the temple, one of his disciples said to him: Master, behold what manner of stones and what buildings are here.
texts.ESV: And as he came out of the temple, one of his disciples said to him, “Look, Teacher, what wonderful stones and what wonderful buildings!”
texts.LEB: And as he was going out of the temple courts, one of his disciples said to him, “Teacher, look! What great stones and what wonderful buildings!”
texts.AMP: As He was coming out of the temple [grounds], one of His disciples said to Him, “Teacher, look what wonderful stones and what wonderful buildings!”
texts.NLT: As Jesus was leaving the Temple that day, one of his disciples said, “Teacher, look at these magnificent buildings! Look at the impressive stones in the walls.”
texts.AKJV: And as he went out of the temple, one of his disciples saith unto him, Master, see what manner of stones and what buildings are here!
texts.NRSV: As he came out of the temple, one of his disciples said to him, “Look, Teacher, what large stones and what large buildings!”

texts.NIV84: "Do you see all these great buildings?" replied Jesus. "Not one stone here will be left on another; every one will be thrown down."
texts.KJV: And Jesus answering said unto him, Seest thou these great buildings? there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NASB95: And Jesus said to him, “Do you see these great buildings? Not one stone will be left upon another which will not be torn down.”
texts.NKJV: And Jesus answered and said to him, “Do you see these great buildings? Not one stone shall be left upon another, that shall not be thrown down.”
texts.DRB: And Jesus answering, said to him: Seest thou all these great buildings? There shall not be left a stone upon a stone, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.ESV: And Jesus said to him, “Do you see these great buildings? There will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down.”
texts.LEB: And Jesus said to him, “Do you see these great buildings? Not one stone will be left here on another stone that will not be thrown down!”
texts.AMP: Jesus replied to him, “You see these great buildings? Not one stone will be left on another which will not be torn down!”
texts.NLT: Jesus replied, “Yes, look at these great buildings. But they will be completely demolished. Not one stone will be left on top of another!”
texts.AKJV: And Jesus answering said unto him, Seest thou these great buildings? there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NRSV: Then Jesus asked him, “Do you see these great buildings? Not one stone will be left here upon another; all will be thrown down.”

texts.NIV84: Some of his disciples were remarking about how the temple was adorned with beautiful stones and with gifts dedicated to God. But Jesus said,
texts.KJV: And as some spake of the temple, how it was adorned with goodly stones and gifts, he said,
texts.NASB95: And while some were talking about the temple, that it was adorned with beautiful stones and votive gifts, He said,
texts.NKJV: Then, as some spoke of the temple, how it was adorned with beautiful stones and donations, He said,
texts.DRB: And some saying of the temple, that it was adorned with goodly stones and gifts, he said:
texts.ESV: And while some were speaking of the temple, how it was adorned with noble stones and offerings, he said,
texts.LEB: And while some were speaking about the temple, that it was adorned with precious stones and votive offerings, he said,
texts.AMP: As some were talking about the temple, that it was decorated with beautiful stones and consecrated offerings [of magnificent gifts of gold which were displayed on the walls and hung in the porticoes], He said,
texts.NLT: Some of his disciples began talking about the majestic stonework of the Temple and the memorial decorations on the walls. But Jesus said,
texts.AKJV: And as some spake of the temple, how it was adorned with goodly stones and gifts, he said,
texts.NRSV: When some were speaking about the temple, how it was adorned with beautiful stones and gifts dedicated to God, he said,

texts.NIV84: "As for what you see here, the time will come when not one stone will be left on another; every one of them will be thrown down."
texts.KJV: As for these things which ye behold, the days will come, in the which there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NASB95: “As for these things which you are looking at, the days will come in which there will not be left one stone upon another which will not be torn down.”
texts.NKJV: “These things which you see—the days will come in which not one stone shall be left upon another that shall not be thrown down.”
texts.DRB: These things which you see, the days will come in which there shall not be left a stone upon a stone that shall not be thrown down.
texts.ESV: “As for these things that you see, the days will come when there will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down.”
texts.LEB: “As for these things that you see—days will come in which not one stone will be left on another stone that will not be thrown down!”
texts.AMP: “As for all these things which you see, the time will come when there will not be one stone left on another that will not be torn down.”
texts.NLT: “The time is coming when all these things will be completely demolished. Not one stone will be left on top of another!”
texts.AKJV: As for these things which ye behold, the days will come, in the which there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
texts.NRSV: “As for these things that you see, the days will come when not one stone will be left upon another; all will be thrown down.”

blocks.title: Signs of Times & End of the Age

texts.NIV84: As Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to him privately. "Tell us," they said, "when will this happen, and what will be the sign of your coming and of the end of the age?"
texts.KJV: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives, the disciples came unto him privately, saying, Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the end of the world?
texts.NASB95: As He was sitting on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to Him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will these things happen, and what will be the sign of Your coming, and of the end of the age?”
texts.NKJV: Now as He sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to Him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will these things be? And what will be the sign of Your coming, and of the end of the age?”
texts.DRB: And when he was sitting on mount Olivet, the disciples came to him privately, saying: Tell us when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the consummation of the world?
texts.ESV: As he sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign of your coming and of the end of the age?”
texts.LEB: And as he was sitting on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came up to him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will these things happen, and what will be the sign of your coming and of the end of the age?”
texts.AMP: While Jesus was seated on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to Him privately, and said, “Tell us, when will this [destruction of the temple] take place, and what will be the sign of Your coming, and of the end (completion, consummation) of the age?”
texts.NLT: Later, Jesus sat on the Mount of Olives. His disciples came to him privately and said, “Tell us, when will all this happen? What sign will signal your return and the end of the world?”
texts.AKJV: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives, the disciples came unto him privately, saying, Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the end of the world?
texts.NRSV: When he was sitting on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will this be, and what will be the sign of your coming and of the end of the age?”

texts.NIV84: Jesus answered: "Watch out that no one deceives you.
texts.KJV: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Take heed that no man deceive you.
texts.NASB95: And Jesus answered and said to them, “See to it that no one misleads you.
texts.NKJV: And Jesus answered and said to them: “Take heed that no one deceives you.
texts.DRB: And Jesus answering, said to them: Take heed that no man seduce you:
texts.ESV: And Jesus answered them, “See that no one leads you astray.
texts.LEB: And Jesus answered and said to them, “Watch out that no one deceives you!
texts.AMP: Jesus answered, “Be careful that no one misleads you [deceiving you and leading you into error].
texts.NLT: Jesus told them, “Don’t let anyone mislead you,
texts.AKJV: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Take heed that no man deceive you.
texts.NRSV: Jesus answered them, “Beware that no one leads you astray.

texts.NIV84: For many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am the Christ, 'and will deceive many.
texts.KJV: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
texts.NASB95: For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and will mislead many.
texts.NKJV: For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and will deceive many.
texts.DRB: For many will come in my name saying, I am Christ: and they will seduce many.
texts.ESV: For many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and they will lead many astray.
texts.LEB: For many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and they will deceive many.
texts.AMP: For many will come in My name [misusing it, and appropriating the strength of the name which belongs to Me], saying, ‘I am the Christ (the Messiah, the Anointed),’ and they will mislead many.
texts.NLT: for many will come in my name, claiming, ‘I am the Messiah.’ They will deceive many.
texts.AKJV: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
texts.NRSV: For many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am the Messiah!’ and they will lead many astray.

texts.NIV84: You will hear of wars and rumors of wars, but see to it that you are not alarmed. Such things must happen, but the end is still to come.
texts.KJV: And ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars: see that ye be not troubled: for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
texts.NASB95: You will be hearing of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not frightened, for those things must take place, but that is not yet the end.
texts.NKJV: And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not troubled; for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
texts.DRB: And you shall hear of wars and rumours of wars. See that ye be not troubled. For these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
texts.ESV: And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not alarmed, for this must take place, but the end is not yet.
texts.LEB: And you are going to hear about wars and rumors of wars. See to it that you are not alarmed, for this must happen, but the end is not yet.
texts.AMP: You will continually hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not frightened, for those things must take place, but that is not yet the end [of the age].
texts.NLT: And you will hear of wars and threats of wars, but don’t panic. Yes, these things must take place, but the end won’t follow immediately.
texts.AKJV: And ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars: see that ye be not troubled: for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
texts.NRSV: And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars; see that you are not alarmed, for this must take place, but the end is not yet.

texts.NIV84: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be famines and earthquakes in various places.
texts.KJV: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in divers places.
texts.NASB95: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and in various places there will be famines and earthquakes.
texts.NKJV: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. And there will be famines, pestilences, and earthquakes in various places.
texts.DRB: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom; and there shall be pestilences, and famines, and earthquakes in places:
texts.ESV: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and there will be famines and earthquakes in various places.
texts.LEB: For nation will rise up against nation and kingdom against kingdom, and there will be famines and earthquakes in various places.
texts.AMP: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and there will be famines and earthquakes in various places.
texts.NLT: Nation will go to war against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be famines and earthquakes in many parts of the world.
texts.AKJV: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in divers places.
texts.NRSV: For nation will rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom, and there will be famines and earthquakes in various places:

texts.NIV84: All these are the beginning of birth pains.
texts.KJV: All these are the beginning of sorrows.
texts.NASB95: But all these things are merely the beginning of birth pangs.
texts.NKJV: All these are the beginning of sorrows.
texts.DRB: Now all these are the beginnings of sorrows.
texts.ESV: All these are but the beginning of the birth pains.
texts.LEB: But all these things are the beginning of birth pains.
texts.AMP: But all these things are merely the beginning of birth pangs [of the intolerable anguish and the time of unprecedented trouble].
texts.NLT: But all this is only the first of the birth pains, with more to come.
texts.AKJV: All these are the beginning of sorrows.
texts.NRSV: all this is but the beginning of the birth pangs.

texts.NIV84: "Then you will be handed over to be persecuted and put to death, and you will be hated by all nations because of me.
texts.KJV: Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall kill you: and ye shall be hated of all nations for my name's sake.
texts.NASB95: “Then they will deliver you to tribulation, and will kill you, and you will be hated by all nations because of My name.
texts.NKJV: “Then they will deliver you up to tribulation and kill you, and you will be hated by all nations for My name’s sake.
texts.DRB: Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall put you to death: and you shall be hated by all nations for my name's sake.
texts.ESV: “Then they will deliver you up to tribulation and put you to death, and you will be hated by all nations for my name's sake.
texts.LEB: “Then they will hand you over to persecution and will kill you, and you will be hated by all the nations because of my name.
texts.AMP: “Then they will hand you over to [endure] tribulation, and will put you to death, and you will be hated by all nations because of My name.
texts.NLT: “Then you will be arrested, persecuted, and killed. You will be hated all over the world because you are my followers.
texts.AKJV: Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall kill you: and ye shall be hated of all nations for my name’s sake.
texts.NRSV: “Then they will hand you over to be tortured and will put you to death, and you will be hated by all nations because of my name.

texts.NIV84: At that time many will turn away from the faith and will betray and hate each other,
texts.KJV: And then shall many be offended, and shall betray one another, and shall hate one another.
texts.NASB95: At that time many will fall away and will betray one another and hate one another.
texts.NKJV: And then many will be offended, will betray one another, and will hate one another.
texts.DRB: And then shall many be scandalized: and shall betray one another: and shall hate one another.
texts.ESV: And then many will fall away and betray one another and hate one another.
texts.LEB: And then many will be led into sin and will betray one another and will hate one another,
texts.AMP: At that time many will be offended and repelled [by their association with Me] and will fall away [from the One whom they should trust] and will betray one another [handing over believers to their persecutors] and will hate one another.
texts.NLT: And many will turn away from me and betray and hate each other.
texts.AKJV: And then shall many be offended, and shall betray one another, and shall hate one another.
texts.NRSV: Then many will fall away, and they will betray one another and hate one another.

texts.NIV84: and many false prophets will appear and deceive many people.
texts.KJV: And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many.
texts.NASB95: Many false prophets will arise and will mislead many.
texts.NKJV: Then many false prophets will rise up and deceive many.
texts.DRB: And many false prophets shall rise, and shall seduce many.
texts.ESV: And many false prophets will arise and lead many astray.
texts.LEB: and many false prophets will appear and will deceive many,
texts.AMP: Many false prophets will appear and mislead many.
texts.NLT: And many false prophets will appear and will deceive many people.
texts.AKJV: And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many.
texts.NRSV: And many false prophets will arise and lead many astray.

texts.NIV84: Because of the increase of wickedness, the love of most will grow cold,
texts.KJV: And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.
texts.NASB95: Because lawlessness is increased, most people’s love will grow cold.
texts.NKJV: And because lawlessness will abound, the love of many will grow cold.
texts.DRB: And because iniquity hath abounded, the charity of many shall grow cold.
texts.ESV: And because lawlessness will be increased, the love of many will grow cold.
texts.LEB: and because lawlessness will increase, the love of many will grow cold.
texts.AMP: Because lawlessness is increased, the love of most people will grow cold.
texts.NLT: Sin will be rampant everywhere, and the love of many will grow cold.
texts.AKJV: And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.
texts.NRSV: And because of the increase of lawlessness, the love of many will grow cold.

texts.NIV84: but he who stands firm to the end will be saved.
texts.KJV: But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
texts.NASB95: But the one who endures to the end, he will be saved.
texts.NKJV: But he who endures to the end shall be saved.
texts.DRB: But he that shall persevere to the end, he shall be saved.
texts.ESV: But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
texts.LEB: But the one who endures to the end—this person will be saved.
texts.AMP: But the one who endures and bears up [under suffering] to the end will be saved.
texts.NLT: But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
texts.AKJV: But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
texts.NRSV: But the one who endures to the end will be saved.

texts.NIV84: And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in the whole world as a testimony to all nations, and then the end will come.
texts.KJV: And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.
texts.NASB95: This gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in the whole world as a testimony to all the nations, and then the end will come.
texts.NKJV: And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness to all the nations, and then the end will come.
texts.DRB: And this gospel of the kingdom, shall be preached in the whole world, for a testimony to all nations, and then shall the consummation come.
texts.ESV: And this gospel of the kingdom will be proclaimed throughout the whole world as a testimony to all nations, and then the end will come.
texts.LEB: And this gospel of the kingdom will be proclaimed in the whole inhabited earth for a testimony to all the nations, and then the end will come.
texts.AMP: This good news of the kingdom [the gospel] will be preached throughout the whole world as a testimony to all the nations, and then the end [of the age] will come.
texts.NLT: And the Good News about the Kingdom will be preached throughout the whole world, so that all nations will hear it; and then the end will come.
texts.AKJV: And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.
texts.NRSV: And this good news of the kingdom will be proclaimed throughout the world, as a testimony to all the nations, and then the end will come.

blocks.title: Signs of Times & End of the Age

texts.NIV84: As Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John and Andrew asked him privately,
texts.KJV: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives over against the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him privately,
texts.NASB95: As He was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew were questioning Him privately,
texts.NKJV: Now as He sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew asked Him privately,
texts.DRB: And as he sat on the mount of Olivet over against the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him apart:
texts.ESV: And as he sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him privately,
texts.LEB: And as he was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him privately,
texts.AMP: As He was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked Him privately,
texts.NLT: Later, Jesus sat on the Mount of Olives across the valley from the Temple. Peter, James, John, and Andrew came to him privately and asked him,

texts.NRSV: When he was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew asked him privately,

texts.NIV84: "Tell us, when will these things happen? And what will be the sign that they are all about to be fulfilled?"
texts.KJV: Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when all these things shall be fulfilled?
texts.NASB95: “Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when all these things are going to be fulfilled?”
texts.NKJV: “Tell us, when will these things be? And what will be the sign when all these things will be fulfilled?”
texts.DRB: Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when all these things shall begin to be fulfilled?
texts.ESV: “Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when all these things are about to be accomplished?”
texts.LEB: “Tell us, when will these things happen, and what will be the sign when all these things are about to be accomplished?”
texts.AMP: “Tell us, when will these things happen, and what will be the sign when all these things are about to be fulfilled?”
texts.NLT: “Tell us, when will all this happen? What sign will show us that these things are about to be fulfilled?”
texts.AKJV: Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when all these things shall be fulfilled?
texts.NRSV: “Tell us, when will this be, and what will be the sign that all these things are about to be accomplished?”

texts.NIV84: Jesus said to them: "Watch out that no one deceives you.
texts.KJV: And Jesus answering them began to say, Take heed lest any man deceive you:
texts.NASB95: And Jesus began to say to them, “See to it that no one misleads you.
texts.NKJV: And Jesus, answering them, began to say: “Take heed that no one deceives you.
texts.DRB: And Jesus answering, began to say to them, Take heed lest any man deceive you.
texts.ESV: And Jesus began to say to them, <span style='color:#952004; font-weight:600'>“See that no one leads you astray.
texts.LEB: So Jesus began to say to them, “Watch out that no one deceives you!
texts.AMP: Jesus began to say to them, “Be careful and see to it that no one misleads you.
texts.NLT: Jesus replied, “Don’t let anyone mislead you,
texts.AKJV: And Jesus answering them began to say, Take heed lest any man deceive you:
texts.NRSV: Then Jesus began to say to them, “Beware that no one leads you astray.

texts.NIV84: Many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am he,' and will deceive many.
texts.KJV: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
texts.NASB95: Many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He!’ and will mislead many.
texts.NKJV: For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He,’ and will deceive many.
texts.DRB: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am he; and they shall deceive many.
texts.ESV: Many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am he!’ and they will lead many astray.
texts.LEB: Many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am he,’ and they will deceive many.
texts.AMP: Many will come in My name [misusing My name or claiming to be the Messiah], saying, ‘I am He!’ and will deceive and mislead many.
texts.NLT: for many will come in my name, claiming, ‘I am the Messiah.’ They will deceive many.
texts.AKJV: for many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
texts.NRSV: Many will come in my name and say, ‘I am he!’ and they will lead many astray.

texts.NIV84: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed. Such things must happen, but the end is still to come.
texts.KJV: And when ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars, be ye not troubled: for such things must needs be; but the end shall not be yet.
texts.NASB95: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be frightened; those things must take place; but that is not yet the end.
texts.NKJV: But when you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be troubled; for such things must happen, but the end is not yet.
texts.DRB: And when you shall hear of wars and rumours of wars, fear ye not. For such things must needs be, but the end is not yet.
texts.ESV: And when you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed. This must take place, but the end is not yet.
texts.LEB: And when you hear about wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed. This must happen, but the end is not yet.
texts.AMP: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed (frightened, troubled); these things must take place, but the end is not yet.
texts.NLT: And you will hear of wars and threats of wars, but don’t panic. Yes, these things must take place, but the end won’t follow immediately.
texts.AKJV: And when ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars, be ye not troubled: for such things must needs be; but the end shall not be yet.
texts.NRSV: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed; this must take place, but the end is still to come.

texts.NIV84: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places, and famines. These are the beginning of birth pains.
texts.KJV: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be earthquakes in divers places, and there shall be famines and troubles: these are the beginnings of sorrows.
texts.NASB95: For nation will rise up against nation, and kingdom against kingdom; there will be earthquakes in various places; there will also be famines. These things are merely the beginning of birth pangs.
texts.NKJV: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. And there will be earthquakes in various places, and there will be famines and troubles. These are the beginnings of sorrows.
texts.DRB: For nation shall rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom, and there shall be earthquakes in divers places, and famines. These things are the beginning of sorrows.
texts.ESV: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places; there will be famines. These are but the beginning of the birth pains.
texts.LEB: For nation will rise up against nation and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places. There will be famines. These things are the beginning of birth pains.
texts.AMP: For nation will rise up against nation, and kingdom against kingdom; there will be earthquakes in various places; there will be famines. These things are the beginning of the birth pangs [the intolerable anguish and suffering].
texts.NLT: Nation will go to war against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in many parts of the world, as well as famines. But this is only the first of the birth pains, with more to come.
texts.AKJV: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be earthquakes in divers places, and there shall be famines and troubles: these are the beginnings of sorrows.
texts.NRSV: For nation will rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom; there will be earthquakes in various places; there will be famines. This is but the beginning of the birth pangs.

texts.NIV84: "You must be on your guard. You will be handed over to the local councils and flogged in the synagogues. On account of me you will stand before governors and kings as witnesses to them.
texts.KJV: But take heed to yourselves: for they shall deliver you up to councils; and in the synagogues ye shall be beaten: and ye shall be brought before rulers and kings for my sake, for a testimony against them.
texts.NASB95: “But be on your guard; for they will deliver you to the courts, and you will be flogged in the synagogues, and you will stand before governors and kings for My sake, as a testimony to them.
texts.NKJV: “But watch out for yourselves, for they will deliver you up to councils, and you will be beaten in the synagogues. You will be brought before rulers and kings for My sake, for a testimony to them.
texts.DRB: But look to yourselves. For they shall deliver you up to councils, and in the synagogues you shall be beaten, and you shall stand before governors and kings for my sake, for a testimony unto them.
texts.ESV: “But be on your guard. For they will deliver you over to councils, and you will be beaten in synagogues, and you will stand before governors and kings for my sake, to bear witness before them.
texts.LEB: “But you, watch out for yourselves! They will hand you over to councils and you will be beaten in the synagogues and will have to stand before governors and kings because of me, for a witness to them.
texts.AMP: “But be on your guard; they will turn you over to courts, and you will be beaten in synagogues, and you will stand [as accused] before governors and kings for My sake, as a testimony to them.
texts.NLT: “When these things begin to happen, watch out! You will be handed over to the local councils and beaten in the synagogues. You will stand trial before governors and kings because you are my followers. But this will be your opportunity to tell them about me.
texts.AKJV: But take heed to yourselves: for they shall deliver you up to councils; and in the synagogues ye shall be beaten: and ye shall be brought before rulers and kings for my sake, for a testimony against them.
texts.NRSV: “As for yourselves, beware, for they will hand you over to councils, and you will be beaten in synagogues, and you will stand before governors and kings because of me, as a testimony to them.

texts.NIV84: And the gospel must first be preached to all nations.
texts.KJV: And the gospel must first be published among all nations.
texts.NASB95: The gospel must first be preached to all the nations.
texts.NKJV: And the gospel must first be preached to all the nations.
texts.DRB: And unto all nations the gospel must first be preached.
texts.ESV: And the gospel must first be proclaimed to all nations.
texts.LEB: And the gospel must first be proclaimed to all the nations.
texts.AMP: The gospel [that is, the good news regarding the way of salvation] must first be preached to all the [Gentile] nations.
texts.NLT: For the Good News must first be preached to all nations.
texts.AKJV: And the gospel must first be published among all nations.
texts.NRSV: And the good news must first be proclaimed to all nations.

texts.NIV84: Whenever you are arrested and brought to trial, do not worry beforehand about what to say. Just say whatever is given you at the time, for it is not you speaking, but the Holy Spirit.
texts.KJV: But when they shall lead you, and deliver you up, take no thought beforehand what ye shall speak, neither do ye premeditate: but whatsoever shall be given you in that hour, that speak ye: for it is not ye that speak, but the Holy Ghost.
texts.NASB95: When they arrest you and hand you over, do not worry beforehand about what you are to say, but say whatever is given you in that hour; for it is not you who speak, but it is the Holy Spirit.
texts.NKJV: <span style='color:#952004; font-weight:600'>But when they arrest you and deliver you up, do not worry beforehand, or premeditate what you will speak. But whatever is given you in that hour, speak that; for it is not you who speak, but the Holy Spirit.
texts.DRB: And when they shall lead you and deliver you up, be not thoughtful beforehand what you shall speak; but whatsoever shall be given you in that hour, that speak ye. For it is not you that speak, but the Holy Ghost.
texts.ESV: And when they bring you to trial and deliver you over, do not be anxious beforehand what you are to say, but say whatever is given you in that hour, for it is not you who speak, but the Holy Spirit.
texts.LEB: And when they arrest you and hand you over, do not be anxious beforehand what you should say, but whatever is given to you at that hour, say this. For you are not the ones who are speaking, but the Holy Spirit.
texts.AMP: When they take you and turn you over [to the court], do not worry beforehand about what to say, but say whatever is given to you [by God] in that hour; for it is not you who speak, but it is the Holy Spirit [who will speak through you].
texts.NLT: But when you are arrested and stand trial, don’t worry in advance about what to say. Just say what God tells you at that time, for it is not you who will be speaking, but the Holy Spirit.
texts.AKJV: But when they shall lead you, and deliver you up, take no thought beforehand what ye shall speak, neither do ye premeditate: but whatsoever shall be given you in that hour, that speak ye: for it is not ye that speak, but the Holy Ghost.
texts.NRSV: When they bring you to trial and hand you over, do not worry beforehand about what you are to say, but say whatever is given you at that time, for it is not you who speak but the Holy Spirit.

texts.NIV84: "Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child. Children will rebel against their parents and have them put to death.
texts.KJV: Now the brother shall betray the brother to death, and the father the son; and children shall rise up against their parents, and shall cause them to be put to death.
texts.NASB95: Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child; and children will rise up against parents and have them put to death.
texts.NKJV: Now brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child; and children will rise up against parents and cause them to be put to death.
texts.DRB: And the brother shall betray his brother unto death, and the father his son; and children shall rise up against the parents, and shall work their death.
texts.ESV: And brother will deliver brother over to death, and the father his child, and children will rise against parents and have them put to death.
texts.LEB: And brother will hand over brother to death, and a father his child, and children will rise up against parents and have them put to death.
texts.AMP: Brother will betray brother to [be put to] death, and a father [will hand over] his child; and children will rise up and take a stand against parents and have them put to death.
texts.NLT: “A brother will betray his brother to death, a father will betray his own child, and children will rebel against their parents and cause them to be killed.
texts.AKJV: Now the brother shall betray the brother to death, and the father the son; and children shall rise up against their parents, and shall cause them to be put to death.
texts.NRSV: Sibling will betray sibling to death and a father his child, and children will rise against parents and have them put to death,

texts.NIV84: All men will hate you because of me, but he who stands firm to the end will be saved.
texts.KJV: And ye shall be hated of all men for my name's sake: but he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
texts.NASB95: You will be hated by all because of My name, but the one who endures to the end, he will be saved.
texts.NKJV: And you will be hated by all for My name’s sake. But he who endures to the end shall be saved.
texts.DRB: And you shall be hated by all men for my name's sake. But he that shall endure unto the end, he shall be saved.
texts.ESV: And you will be hated by all for my name's sake. But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
texts.LEB: And you will be hated by all because of my name. But the one who endures to the end—this one will be saved.
texts.AMP: You will be hated by everyone because of [your association with] My name, but the one who [patiently perseveres empowered by the Holy Spirit and] endures to the end, he will be saved.
texts.NLT: And everyone will hate you because you are my followers. But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
texts.AKJV: And ye shall be hated of all men for my name’s sake: but he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
texts.NRSV: and you will be hated by all because of my name. But the one who endures to the end will be saved.

blocks.title: Signs of Times & End of the Age

texts.NIV84: "Teacher," they asked, "when will these things happen? And what will be the sign that they are about to take place?"
texts.KJV: And they asked him, saying, Master, but when shall these things be? and what sign will there be when these things shall come to pass?
texts.NASB95: They questioned Him, saying, “Teacher, when therefore will these things happen? And what will be the sign when these things are about to take place?”
texts.NKJV: So they asked Him, saying, “Teacher, but when will these things be? And what sign will there be when these things are about to take place?”
texts.DRB: And they asked him, saying: Master, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when they shall begin to come to pass?
texts.ESV: And they asked him, “Teacher, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when these things are about to take place?”
texts.LEB: And they asked him, saying, “Teacher, when therefore will these things happen, and what will be the sign when these things are about to take place?”
texts.AMP: They asked Him, “Teacher, when will these things happen? And what will be the sign when these things are about to happen?”
texts.NLT: “Teacher,” they asked, “when will all this happen? What sign will show us that these things are about to take place?”
texts.AKJV: And they asked him, saying, Master, but when shall these things be? and what sign will there be when these things shall come to pass?
texts.NRSV: They asked him, “Teacher, when will this be, and what will be the sign that this is about to take place?”

texts.NIV84: He replied: "Watch out that you are not deceived. For many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am he,' and, 'The time is near.' Do not follow them.
texts.KJV: And he said, Take heed that ye be not deceived: for many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and the time draweth near: go ye not therefore after them.
texts.NASB95: And He said, “See to it that you are not misled; for many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He,’ and, ‘The time is near.’ Do not go after them.
texts.NKJV: And He said: “Take heed that you not be deceived. For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am He,’ and, ‘The time has drawn near.’ Therefore do not go after them.
texts.DRB: Who said: Take heed you be not seduced; for many will come in my name, saying, I am he; and the time is at hand: go ye not therefore after them.
texts.ESV: And he said, “See that you are not led astray. For many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am he!’ and, ‘The time is at hand!’ Do not go after them.
texts.LEB: And he said, Watch out that you are not deceived! For many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am he,’ and ‘The time is near!’ Do not go after them!
texts.AMP: He said, “Be careful and see to it that you are not misled; for many will come in My name [appropriating for themselves the name Messiah which belongs to Me alone], saying, ‘I am He,’ and, ‘The time is near!’ Do not follow them.
texts.NLT: He replied, “Don’t let anyone mislead you, for many will come in my name, claiming, ‘I am the Messiah,’ and saying, ‘The time has come!’ But don’t believe them.
texts.AKJV: And he said, Take heed that ye be not deceived: for many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and the time draweth near: go ye not therefore after them.
texts.NRSV: And he said, “Beware that you are not led astray, for many will come in my name and say, ‘I am he!’ and, ‘The time is near!’ Do not go after them.

texts.NIV84: When you hear of wars and revolutions, do not be frightened. These things must happen first, but the end will not come right away."
texts.KJV: But when ye shall hear of wars and commotions, be not terrified: for these things must first come to pass; but the end is not by and by.
texts.NASB95: When you hear of wars and disturbances, do not be terrified; for these things must take place first, but the end does not follow immediately.”
texts.NKJV: But when you hear of wars and commotions, do not be terrified; for these things must come to pass first, but the end will not come immediately.”
texts.DRB: And when you shall hear of wars and seditions, be not terrified: these things must first come to pass; but the end is not yet presently.
texts.ESV: And when you hear of wars and tumults, do not be terrified, for these things must first take place, but the end will not be at once.”
texts.LEB: And when you hear about wars and insurrections, do not be terrified, for these things must happen first, but the end will not be at once.”
texts.AMP: When you hear of wars and disturbances [civil unrest, revolts, uprisings], do not panic; for these things must take place first, but the end will not come immediately.”
texts.NLT: And when you hear of wars and insurrections, don’t panic. Yes, these things must take place first, but the end won’t follow immediately.”
texts.AKJV: But when ye shall hear of wars and commotions, be not terrified: for these things must first come to pass; but the end is not by and by.
texts.NRSV: “When you hear of wars and insurrections, do not be terrified, for these things must take place first, but the end will not follow immediately.”

texts.NIV84: Then he said to them: "Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.KJV: Then said he unto them, Nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom:
texts.NASB95: Then He continued by saying to them, “Nation will rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom,
texts.NKJV: Then He said to them, “Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.DRB: Then he said to them: Nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.ESV: Then he said to them, “Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.LEB: Then he said to them, “nation will rise up against nation and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.AMP: Then Jesus told them, “Nation will rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.NLT: Then he added, “Nation will go to war against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
texts.AKJV: Then said he unto them, Nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom:
texts.NRSV: Then he said to them, “Nation will rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom;

texts.NIV84: There will be great earthquakes, famines and pestilences in various places, and fearful events and great signs from heaven.
texts.KJV: And great earthquakes shall be in divers places, and famines, and pestilences; and fearful sights and great signs shall there be from heaven.
texts.NASB95: and there will be great earthquakes, and in various places plagues and famines; and there will be terrors and great signs from heaven.
texts.NKJV: And there will be great earthquakes in various places, and famines and pestilences; and there will be fearful sights and great signs from heaven.
texts.DRB: And there shall be great earthquakes in divers places, and pestilences, and famines, and terrors from heaven; and there shall be great signs.
texts.ESV: There will be great earthquakes, and in various places famines and pestilences. And there will be terrors and great signs from heaven.
texts.LEB: There will be great earthquakes and famines and plagues in various places. There will be terrible sights and great signs from heaven.
texts.AMP: There will be violent earthquakes, and in various places famines and [deadly and devastating] pestilences (plagues, epidemics); and there will be terrible sights and great signs from heaven.
texts.NLT: There will be great earthquakes, and there will be famines and plagues in many lands, and there will be terrifying things and great miraculous signs from heaven.
texts.AKJV: and great earthquakes shall be in divers places, and famines, and pestilences; and fearful sights and great signs shall there be from heaven.
texts.NRSV: there will be great earthquakes and in various places famines and plagues, and there will be dreadful portents and great signs from heaven.

texts.NIV84: "But before all this, they will lay hands on you and persecute you. They will deliver you to synagogues and prisons, and you will be brought before kings and governors, and all on account of my name.
texts.KJV: But before all these, they shall lay their hands on you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues, and into prisons, being brought before kings and rulers for my name's sake.
texts.NASB95: “But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you, delivering you to the synagogues and prisons, bringing you before kings and governors for My name’s sake.
texts.NKJV: But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues and prisons. You will be brought before kings and rulers for My name’s sake.
texts.DRB: But before all these things, they will lay their hands upon you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues and into prisons, dragging you before kings and governors, for my name's sake.
texts.ESV: But before all this they will lay their hands on you and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues and prisons, and you will be brought before kings and governors for my name's sake.
texts.LEB: “But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you, handing you over to the synagogues and prisons. You will be brought before kings and governors because of my name.
texts.AMP: “But before all these things, they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you, turning you over to the synagogues and prisons, and bringing you before kings and governors for My name’s sake.
texts.NLT: “But before all this occurs, there will be a time of great persecution. You will be dragged into synagogues and prisons, and you will stand trial before kings and governors because you are my followers.
texts.AKJV: But before all these, they shall lay their hands on you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues, and into prisons, being brought before kings and rulers for my name’s sake.
texts.NRSV: “But before all this occurs, they will arrest you and persecute you; they will hand you over to synagogues and prisons, and you will be brought before kings and governors because of my name.

texts.NIV84: This will result in your being witnesses to them.
texts.KJV: And it shall turn to you for a testimony.
texts.NASB95: It will lead to an opportunity for your testimony.
texts.NKJV: But it will turn out for you as an occasion for testimony.
texts.DRB: And it shall happen unto you for a testimony.
texts.ESV: This will be your opportunity to bear witness.
texts.LEB: This will turn out to you for a time of witness.
texts.AMP: This will be a time and an opportunity for you to testify [about Me].
texts.NLT: But this will be your opportunity to tell them about me.
texts.AKJV: And it shall turn to you for a testimony.
texts.NRSV: This will give you an opportunity to testify.

texts.NIV84: But make up your mind not to worry beforehand how you will defend yourselves.
texts.KJV: Settle it therefore in your hearts, not to meditate before what ye shall answer:
texts.NASB95: So make up your minds not to prepare beforehand to defend yourselves;
texts.NKJV: Therefore settle it in your hearts not to meditate beforehand on what you will answer;
texts.DRB: Lay it up therefore into your hearts, not to meditate before how you shall answer:
texts.ESV: Settle it therefore in your minds not to meditate beforehand how to answer,
texts.LEB: Therefore make up your minds not to prepare in advance to speak in your own defense,
texts.AMP: So make up your minds not to prepare beforehand to defend yourselves;
texts.NLT: So don’t worry in advance about how to answer the charges against you,
texts.AKJV: Settle it therefore in your hearts, not to meditate before what ye shall answer:
texts.NRSV: So make up your minds not to prepare your defense in advance,

texts.NIV84: For I will give you words and wisdom that none of your adversaries will be able to resist or contradict.
texts.KJV: For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to gainsay nor resist.
texts.NASB95: for I will give you utterance and wisdom which none of your opponents will be able to resist or refute.
texts.NKJV: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom which all your adversaries will not be able to contradict or resist.
texts.DRB: For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to resist and gainsay.
texts.ESV: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which none of your adversaries will be able to withstand or contradict.
texts.LEB: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom that all your opponents will not be able to resist or contradict.
texts.AMP: for I will give you [skillful] words and wisdom which none of your opponents will be able to resist or refute.
texts.NLT: for I will give you the right words and such wisdom that none of your opponents will be able to reply or refute you!
texts.AKJV: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to gainsay nor resist.
texts.NRSV: for I will give you words and a wisdom that none of your opponents will be able to withstand or contradict.

texts.NIV84: You will be betrayed even by parents, brothers, relatives and friends, and they will put some of you to death.
texts.KJV: And ye shall be betrayed both by parents, and brethren, and kinsfolks, and friends; and some of you shall they cause to be put to death.
texts.NASB95: But you will be betrayed even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends, and they will put some of you to death,
texts.NKJV: You will be betrayed even by parents and brothers, relatives and friends; and they will put some of you to death.
texts.DRB: And you shall be betrayed by your parents and brethren, and kinsmen and friends; and some of you they will put to death.
texts.ESV: You will be delivered up even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends, and some of you they will put to death.
texts.LEB: And you will be handed over even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends, and they will put to death some of you.
texts.AMP: But you will be betrayed and handed over even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends, and they will put some of you to death,
texts.NLT: Even those closest to you—your parents, brothers, relatives, and friends—will betray you. They will even kill some of you.
texts.AKJV: And ye shall be betrayed both by parents, and brethren, and kinsfolks, and friends; and some of you shall they cause to be put to death.
texts.NRSV: You will be betrayed even by parents and siblings, by relatives and friends, and they will put some of you to death.

texts.NASB95: and you will be hated by all because of My name.
texts.NKJV: And you will be hated by all for My name’s sake.
texts.DRB: And you shall be hated by all men for my name's sake.
texts.ESV: You will be hated by all for my name's sake.
texts.LEB: And you will be hated by all because of my name.
texts.AMP: and you will be continually hated by everyone because of [your association with] My name.
texts.NLT: And everyone will hate you because you are my followers.
texts.AKJV: And ye shall be hated of all men for my name’s sake.
texts.NRSV: You will be hated by all because of my name.

texts.NRSV: But not a hair of your head will perish.

texts.NKJV: By your patience possess your souls.
texts.DRB: In your patience you shall possess your souls.
texts.ESV: By your endurance you will gain your lives.
texts.LEB: By your patient endurance you will gain your lives.
texts.AMP: By your [patient] endurance [empowered by the Holy Spirit] you will gain your souls.
texts.NLT: By standing firm, you will win your souls.
texts.AKJV: In your patience possess ye your souls.
texts.NRSV: By your endurance you will gain your souls.

texts.NIV84: "So when you see standing in the holy place 'the abomination that causes desolation,' spoken of through the prophet Daniel--let the reader understand--

texts.ESV: For false christs and false prophets will arise and perform signs and wonders, to lead astray, if possible, the elect.
texts.LEB: For false messiahs and false prophets will appear, and will produce signs and wonders in order to mislead, if possible, the elect.
texts.AMP: for false Christs and false prophets will arise, and they will provide signs and wonders in order to deceive, if [such a thing were] possible, even the elect [those God has chosen for Himself].
texts.NLT: For false messiahs and false prophets will rise up and perform signs and wonders so as to deceive, if possible, even God’s chosen ones.
texts.AKJV: for false Christs and false prophets shall rise, and shall shew signs and wonders, to seduce, if it were possible, even the elect.
texts.NRSV: False messiahs and false prophets will appear and produce signs and wonders, to lead astray, if possible, the elect.

texts.NIV84: So be on your guard; I have told you everything ahead of time.
texts.KJV: But take ye heed: behold, I have foretold you all things.
texts.NASB95: But take heed; behold, I have told you everything in advance.
texts.NKJV: But take heed; see, I have told you all things beforehand.
texts.DRB: Take you heed therefore; behold I have foretold you all things.
texts.ESV: But be on guard; I have told you all things beforehand.
texts.LEB: But you, watch out! I have told you everything ahead of time!
texts.AMP: But be on your guard; I have told you everything in advance.
texts.NLT: Watch out! I have warned you about this ahead of time!
texts.AKJV: But take ye heed: behold, I have foretold you all things.
texts.NRSV: But be alert; I have already told you everything.

texts.NIV84: "When you see Jerusalem being surrounded by armies, you will know that its desolation is near.
texts.KJV: And when ye shall see Jerusalem compassed with armies, then know that the desolation thereof is nigh.
texts.NASB95: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then recognize that her desolation is near.
texts.NKJV: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation is near.
texts.DRB: And when you shall see Jerusalem compassed about with an army; then know that the desolation thereof is at hand.
texts.ESV: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation has come near.
texts.LEB: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation has come near.
texts.AMP: “But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by [hostile] armies, then understand [with confident assurance] that her complete destruction is near.
texts.NLT: “And when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then you will know that the time of its destruction has arrived.
texts.AKJV: And when ye shall see Jerusalem compassed with armies, then know that the desolation thereof is nigh.
texts.NRSV: “When you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, then know that its desolation has come near.

texts.NIV84: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains, let those in the city get out, and let those in the country not enter the city.
texts.KJV: Then let them which are in Judaea flee to the mountains; and let them which are in the midst of it depart out; and let not them that are in the countries enter thereinto.
texts.NASB95: Then those who are in Judea must flee to the mountains, and those who are in the midst of the city must leave, and those who are in the country must not enter the city;
texts.NKJV: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains, let those who are in the midst of her depart, and let not those who are in the country enter her.
texts.DRB: Then let those who are in Judea, flee to the mountains; and those who are in the midst thereof, depart out: and those who are in the countries, not enter into it.
texts.ESV: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains, and let those who are inside the city depart, and let not those who are out in the country enter it,
texts.LEB: Then those in Judea must flee to the mountains, and those inside it must depart, and those in the fields must not enter into it,
texts.AMP: At that time, those who are in Judea must flee to the mountains, and those who are inside the city (Jerusalem) must get out, and those who are [out] in the country must not enter the city;
texts.NLT: Then those in Judea must flee to the hills. Those in Jerusalem must get out, and those out in the country should not return to the city.
texts.AKJV: Then let them which are in Judæa flee to the mountains; and let them which are in the midst of it depart out; and let not them that are in the countries enter thereinto.
texts.NRSV: Then those in Judea must flee to the mountains, and those inside the city must leave it, and those out in the country must not enter it,

texts.NIV84: For this is the time of punishment in fulfillment of all that has been written.
texts.KJV: For these be the days of vengeance, that all things which are written may be fulfilled.
texts.NASB95: because these are days of vengeance, so that all things which are written will be fulfilled.
texts.NKJV: For these are the days of vengeance, that all things which are written may be fulfilled.
texts.DRB: For these are the days of vengeance, that all things may be fulfilled, that are written.
texts.ESV: for these are days of vengeance, to fulfill all that is written.
texts.LEB: because these are days of vengeance, so that all the things that are written can be fulfilled.
texts.AMP: for these are days of vengeance [of rendering full justice or satisfaction], so that all things which are written will be fulfilled.
texts.NLT: For those will be days of God’s vengeance, and the prophetic words of the Scriptures will be fulfilled.
texts.AKJV: For these be the days of vengeance, that all things which are written may be fulfilled.
texts.NRSV: for these are days of vengeance, as a fulfillment of all that is written.

texts.NIV84: How dreadful it will be in those days for pregnant women and nursing mothers! There will be great distress in the land and wrath against this people.
texts.KJV: But woe unto them that are with child, and to them that give suck, in those days! for there shall be great distress in the land, and wrath upon this people.
texts.NASB95: Woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing babies in those days; for there will be great distress upon the land and wrath to this people;
texts.NKJV: But woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing babies in those days! For there will be great distress in the land and wrath upon this people.
texts.DRB: But woe to them that are with child, and give suck in those days; for there shall be great distress in the land, and wrath upon this people.
texts.ESV: Alas for women who are pregnant and for those who are nursing infants in those days! For there will be great distress upon the earth and wrath against this people.
texts.LEB: Woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing their babies in those days! For there will be great distress on the earth and wrath against this people,
texts.AMP: Woe to those women who are pregnant and to those who are nursing babies in those days! For great trouble and anguish will be on the land, and wrath and retribution on this people [Israel].
texts.NLT: How terrible it will be for pregnant women and for nursing mothers in those days. For there will be disaster in the land and great anger against this people.
texts.AKJV: But woe unto them that are with child, and to them that give suck, in those days! for there shall be great distress in the land, and wrath upon this people.
texts.NRSV: Woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing infants in those days! For there will be great distress on the earth and wrath against this people;

texts.NIV84: They will fall by the sword and will be taken as prisoners to all the nations. Jerusalem will be trampled on by the Gentiles until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
texts.KJV: And they shall fall by the edge of the sword, and shall be led away captive into all nations: and Jerusalem shall be trodden down of the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles be fulfilled.
texts.NASB95: and they will fall by the edge of the sword, and will be led captive into all the nations; and Jerusalem will be trampled under foot by the Gentiles until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
texts.NKJV: And they will fall by the edge of the sword, and be led away captive into all nations. And Jerusalem will be trampled by Gentiles until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
texts.DRB: And they shall fall by the edge of the sword; and shall be led away captives into all nations; and Jerusalem shall be trodden down by the Gentiles; till the times of the nations be fulfilled.
texts.ESV: They will fall by the edge of the sword and be led captive among all nations, and Jerusalem will be trampled underfoot by the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
texts.LEB: and they will fall by the edge of the sword, and will be led captive into all the nations, and Jerusalem will be trampled down by the Gentiles until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
texts.AMP: And they will fall by the edge of the sword, and will be led captive into all nations; and Jerusalem will be trampled underfoot by the Gentiles until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled (completed).
texts.NLT: They will be killed by the sword or sent away as captives to all the nations of the world. And Jerusalem will be trampled down by the Gentiles until the period of the Gentiles comes to an end.
texts.AKJV: And they shall fall by the edge of the sword, and shall be led away captive into all nations: and Jerusalem shall be trodden down of the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles be fulfilled.
texts.NRSV: they will fall by the edge of the sword and be taken away as captives among all nations, and Jerusalem will be trampled on by the nations, until the times of the nations are fulfilled.

blocks.title: Coming of the Son of Man

texts.NIV84: "Immediately after the distress of those days "'the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light; the stars will fall from the sky, and the heavenly bodies will be shaken.'
texts.KJV: Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken:
texts.NASB95: “But immediately after the tribulation of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light, and the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
texts.NKJV: “Immediately after the tribulation of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light; the stars will fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
texts.DRB: And immediately after the tribulation of those days, the sun shall be darkened and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of heaven shall be moved:
texts.ESV: “Immediately after the tribulation of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light, and the stars will fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
texts.LEB: “And immediately after the tribulation of those days, ‘the sun will be darkened and the moon will not give its light, and the stars will fall from heaven, and the powers of heaven will be shaken.’
texts.AMP: “Immediately after the tribulation of those days THE SUN WILL BE DARKENED, AND THE MOON WILL NOT PROVIDE ITS LIGHT, AND THE STARS WILL FALL from the sky, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
texts.NLT: “Immediately after the anguish of those days, the sun will be darkened, the moon will give no light, the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers in the heavens will be shaken.
texts.AKJV: Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken:
texts.NRSV: “Immediately after the suffering of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light; the stars will fall from heaven, and the powers of heaven will be shaken.

texts.NIV84: "At that time the sign of the Son of Man will appear in the sky, and all the nations of the earth will mourn. They will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of the sky, with power and great glory.
texts.KJV: And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.NASB95: And then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in the sky, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of the sky with power and great glory.
texts.NKJV: Then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in heaven, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.DRB: And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all tribes of the earth mourn: and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with much power and majesty.
texts.ESV: Then will appear in heaven the sign of the Son of Man, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.LEB: And then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in heaven, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man arriving on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.AMP: And at that time the sign of the Son of Man [coming in His glory] will appear in the sky, and then all the tribes of the earth [and especially Israel] will mourn [regretting their rebellion and rejection of the Messiah], and they will see the SON OF MAN COMING ON THE CLOUDS OF HEAVEN with power and great glory [in brilliance and splendor].
texts.NLT: And then at last, the sign that the Son of Man is coming will appear in the heavens, and there will be deep mourning among all the peoples of the earth. And they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.AKJV: and then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
texts.NRSV: “Then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in heaven, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see ‘the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven’ with power and great glory.

texts.NIV84: And he will send his angels with a loud trumpet call, and they will gather his elect from the four winds, from one end of the heavens to the other.
texts.KJV: And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
texts.NASB95: And He will send forth His angels with a great trumpet and they will gather together His elect from the four winds, from one end of the sky to the other.
texts.NKJV: And He will send His angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they will gather together His elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
texts.DRB: And he shall send his angels with a trumpet, and a great voice: and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from the farthest parts of the heavens to the utmost bounds of them.
texts.ESV: And he will send out his angels with a loud trumpet call, and they will gather his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
texts.LEB: And he will send out his angels with a loud trumpet call, and they will gather his elect together from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other end of it.
texts.AMP: And He will send His angels with A LOUD TRUMPET and THEY WILL GATHER TOGETHER His elect (God’s chosen ones) from the four winds, from one end of the heavens to the other.
texts.NLT: And he will send out his angels with the mighty blast of a trumpet, and they will gather his chosen ones from all over the world—from the farthest ends of the earth and heaven.
texts.AKJV: And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
texts.NRSV: And he will send out his angels with a loud trumpet call, and they will gather his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.

texts.NIV84: "Now learn this lesson from the fig tree: As soon as its twigs get tender and its leaves come out, you know that summer is near.
texts.KJV: Now learn a parable of the fig tree; When his branch is yet tender, and putteth forth leaves, ye know that summer is nigh:
texts.NASB95: “Now learn the parable from the fig tree: when its branch has already become tender and puts forth its leaves, you know that summer is near;
texts.NKJV: “Now learn this parable from the fig tree: When its branch has already become tender and puts forth leaves, you know that summer is near.
texts.DRB: And from the fig tree learn a parable: When the branch thereof is now tender, and the leaves come forth, you know that summer is nigh.
texts.ESV: “From the fig tree learn its lesson: as soon as its branch becomes tender and puts out its leaves, you know that summer is near.
texts.LEB: “Now learn the parable from the fig tree: Whenever its branch has already become tender and puts forth its leaves, you know that summer is near.
texts.AMP: “Now learn this lesson from the fig tree: As soon as its young shoots become tender and it puts out its leaves, you know that summer is near;
texts.NLT: “Now learn a lesson from the fig tree. When its branches bud and its leaves begin to sprout, you know that summer is near.
texts.AKJV: Now learn a parable of the fig tree; When his branch is yet tender, and putteth forth leaves, ye know that summer is nigh:
texts.NRSV: “From the fig tree learn its lesson: as soon as its branch becomes tender and puts forth its leaves, you know that summer is near.
